'''Pollux''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the passenger starship ''[[Nebula Chaser]]'' during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He died after the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] sisters [[Alema Rar|Alema]] and [[Numa Rar]] escaped from the ''Nebula Chaser'', and the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] punished him and his crew for allowing Jedi on board and not telling them about their presence.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
